comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Iteration 9 added Effect Schema decoding for dream_finish params in dream/init.ts and dream/runner.ts. Remaining cast cleanup is the generic ToolDefinition integration boundary in dream runner/tool wiring.

comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Further progress: dream/runner memory tool mutation tracking now uses guarded helpers (isRecord-based) instead of direct Record casts; remaining work is consolidating ToolDefinition integration casts behind one adapter.
